code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{Retail_PointOfSale}/callback
(Retail_Inventory) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (Retail_PointOfSale) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{Retail_Inventory} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{Retail_CouponSystem} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (Retail_PointOfSale) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{Retail_CustomerLoyalty} 300 {Retail_Inventory} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Retail_CouponSystem) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (Retail_CustomerLoyalty) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{Retail_OrderManagement}/players/{Retail_CouponSystem}
{Retail_PointOfSale} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (Retail_Inventory) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (Retail_Inventory) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Retail_PointOfSale) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{Retail_CustomerLoyalty} {Retail_CouponSystem}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (Retail_CouponSystem) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Retail_Inventory}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}/messages
{Retail_PointOfSale], components: [Retail_OrderManagement] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Retail_CouponSystem] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{Retail_PointOfSale}/messages/@original
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}/messages/@original
{Retail_PointOfSale)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (Retail_CouponSystem) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{Retail_Inventory} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{Retail_CouponSystem} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(Retail_OrderManagement) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{Retail_CouponSystem} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(Retail_CustomerLoyalty) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{Retail_CustomerLoyalty}/players/{Retail_OrderManagement} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Retail_OrderManagement} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{Retail_Inventory}/messages/{Retail_Inventory}
{Retail_PointOfSale] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (Retail_OrderManagement) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的时序图，展示用户执行/play命令时的完整流程。这个流程涉及Discord Bot的音频播放系统，从用户输入到最终听到音乐的完整链路。
明白了。这个流程的起点是Discord用户在聊天框输入/play命令，对吧？然后Discord API会把交互事件推送到我们的Gateway Service？
对，Discord会发送INTERACTION_CREATE事件到Gateway。Gateway需要先验证交互权限，然后立即给用户一个"处理中"的反馈，避免用户觉得卡住了。
好，我先把开头画出来：用户发起命令，Discord激活，推送事件到Gateway，Gateway验证后回调查询给用户显示处理状态。接下来Gateway要做什么？
Gateway需要查询这个服务器的设置，比如默认音量、是否启用自动播放这些配置。然后从PostgreSQL读取，之后通过Redis Pub/Sub把命令转发给Audio Service。
这里有个问题——为什么用Redis而不是直接调用Audio Service？是为了解耦吗？
没错，Gateway和Audio Service是独立部署的，通过Redis消息队列解耦。这样Gateway可以水平扩展，Audio Service也可以独立扩缩容。消息投递后Audio Service开始处理。
已添加Redis消息队列和Audio Service的激活。Audio Service首先要提取查询内容和服务器信息，然后读取当前队列状态。这里需要查PostgreSQL的queue表对吧？
对，Audio Service要判断当前队列是空还是有待播歌曲。然后进入搜索环节——这里要画一个alt分支：用户可能直接给YouTube链接，也可能给搜索词。
添加了alt分支。如果是URL就直接解析视频ID；如果是搜索词，Audio Service调用Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink再去请求YouTube API。这样画对吗？
正确。Lavalink拿到搜索结果后返回给Audio Service，Audio Service默认选第一个结果。然后有个重要步骤——要把搜索结果缓存到Redis，设置5分钟过期，避免重复搜索。
缓存之后就是加入队列的逻辑。这里应该再分一个alt：如果队列是空的，这是第一首歌，需要启动播放；如果队列非空，就追加到末尾。这个理解对吗？
完全正确。如果是第一首歌，流程最复杂：插入队列后，Audio Service要调用Lavalink创建player并连接到语音频道，Lavalink和Discord建立语音连接，然后从YouTube拉取音频流，编码后发送opus包到Discord。
已画出第一首歌的完整播放链路。如果是追加到队列的情况，Audio Service先查当前最大position，然后插入新记录，这个分支相对简单。两种情况后都要更新Redis缓存？
对，都要用SETEX更新queue缓存，1小时过期。然后还有UI更新——如果是第一首歌，要通过Redis通知Gateway发送"正在播放"的富文本消息；如果是追加，就修改原来的 ephemeral 消息显示"已加入队列"。
等等，我需要修正一下——第一首歌的情况下，Gateway还要删除最开始那个"处理中"的原始消息，对吧？之前漏掉了这个DELETE操作。
对的，那个DELETE /webhooks/.../messages/@original 很重要，不然用户会看到两条消息。现在补充播放中的状态同步——需要画一个loop，每5秒Lavalink推送PlayerUpdate事件。
已添加loop循环，展示Lavalink定期推送状态，Audio Service转发到Redis，Gateway消费后按需更新UI。最后是歌曲结束的处理，这个也要分支对吧？
是的，歌曲结束时Audio Service收到TrackEnd事件，先删除队列里position=0的记录，然后把其他记录position减1重新索引。然后分三种情况：队列还有歌就继续播；空了且开自动播放就推荐相似歌曲；空了且没开自动播放就销毁player。
自动播放推荐歌曲这个细节——是Audio Service自己内部处理，不需要调用外部API吗？
对，推荐逻辑在Audio Service内部，基于最后一首歌的特征匹配相似曲目，然后自己添加到队列并触发播放。如果自动播放关闭，就要调用Lavalink DELETE接口销毁player，同时通知Gateway更新UI显示"队列已结束"。
已补全三种结束分支。整个图从用户输入命令开始，到可能持续播放多首歌，最终到队列清空结束，形成了一个完整的闭环。需要再检查一下哪里遗漏了吗？
整体结构没问题。不过建议在开头和结尾加两个Note，说明这是"用户想在语音频道播放歌曲"的场景，以及最终"用户听到音乐播放/流程结束"的状态，让读者更容易理解上下文。
已添加首尾注释。这个时序图现在完整展示了/play命令的全生命周期，包括正常播放、队列管理、状态同步和结束处理的全部细节。还有需要调整的地方吗？
没有了，这个版本很完整。从Discord交互到音频播放的技术细节都覆盖到了，分支逻辑也清晰。可以定稿了。
